title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Mothercare India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Mothercare India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Mothercare India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Digital Marketing Manager to strengthen our Bhubaneswar-based team.

About Mothercare India:
Mothercare India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Data Analytics

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mothercare India!
